latestHandover: SESSION 3 COMPLETE (2026-03-12). Phase 4 done. Completed: KEY-01-T1–T4 (planner-frontend + workforce-frontend globalSetup.ts updated to use NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_JWT ?? ANON_KEY fallback for signInWithPassword; CI Start Supabase steps updated to export ANON_KEY as ANON_JWT matching preference-frontend reference), CICD-03-T1+T2 (planner-frontend + workforce-frontend ci.yml — SERVICE_ROLE_KEY now dynamically extracted from supabase status -o env instead of LOCAL_SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY static secret), CICD-03-T3 (LOCAL_SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY GitHub Secret deleted from both repos). RESEARCH NOTE: Web search confirmed publishable key (sb_publishable_*) is the official replacement for anon JWT for cloud-hosted GoTrue auth ops; however supabase status -o env still outputs ANON_KEY (legacy JWT) in addition to PUBLISHABLE_KEY. The preference-frontend reference implementation already exports ANON_KEY as ANON_JWT for local CI GoTrue compatibility. New branches: planner-frontend audit/260312-cicd-environments (07dc9c5), workforce-frontend audit/260312-cicd-environments (07ceaa3). Both tsc --noEmit passed; lint-staged eslint also passed. NEXT SESSION: Phase 5 — CICD Pipeline (CICD-02, CGEN-01, CGEN-02, CICD-04, CICD-05, BACK-01, BACK-02, CICD-07, ENV-10, CICD-09). These span supabase-receptor, planner-frontend, workforce-frontend, match-backend, receptor-planner.

sessionHistory.summary: Phase 1 (ADRs + pre-implementation docs) and Phase 2 (Helmfile + CI required check matrix) completed. 10 tasks marked complete. supabase-receptor audit branch created and pushed.

Phase 3 (Core Cluster Stack) completed. 21 tasks marked complete across supabase-receptor (9 files created/expanded) and common-bond (SoA 8.16 updated). New files: staging.md, incident-response.md, network-policies.yaml, serviceaccounts.yaml, falco-rules.yaml, cluster-issuer.yaml, alertmanager-config.yaml.

Phase 4 (CI Keys) completed. 7 tasks marked complete across planner-frontend and workforce-frontend. Changes: ANON_JWT export added to ci.yml Start Supabase step; SERVICE_ROLE_KEY now dynamically extracted (CICD-03); globalSetup.ts updated to use ANON_JWT for signInWithPassword; LOCAL_SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY GitHub Secret deleted from both repos (CICD-03-T3).
